adapter.description:
Optional preferred storage or delivery adapter. Slack adapters deliver into the mapped Slack thread; omitted document artifacts use connector storage with S3 fallback.

* `slack_message` - slack_message
* `slack_canvas` - slack_canvas
* `document_connector` - document_connector
* `s3` - s3
* `github_pr` - github_pr

artifact_type.description:
Artifact format or delivery surface to create.

* `slack_message` - slack_message
* `slack_canvas` - slack_canvas
* `document` - document
* `spreadsheet` - spreadsheet
* `dashboard` - dashboard
* `file` - file
* `github_pr` - github_pr

content.description: Markdown or text content for the initial artifact version.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to persist with the living artifact.

name.description: Human-readable artifact name, used as the title.

source_artifact_id.description: Existing run artifact id to use as the initial content source.

source_storage_path.description: Existing run artifact storage_path to use as the initial content source.
